task: Restructure roadmap phases: move approval gate to Phase 5, rename Phase 4 (Public Launch) to Phase 4 (Team Scale), push launch to Phase 7, and strip migration overhead since only single-user deployment currently.
discussion_summary: User clarified that askr is currently single-user only, so migration complexity in Phase 4 was premature. Agreed to move approval gate (dangerously-skip-permissions, unrestricted Bash, rm/delete triggers) into Phase 5 (Hardening). Restructured Phase 4 from 'Public Launch' to 'Team Scale' with three stages: P4-0 (team directory structure), P4-1 (task queue per developer), P4-2 (askr team CLI). Public launch pushed to Phase 7. Two roadmap.md edits completed to reflect these changes.

accomplishments.what: Moved approval gate feature from Phase 7 into Phase 5 (Hardening) with trigger conditions and two-path behavior (IDE popup vs Discord headless)
Removed Phase 3.9 duplicate entry from roadmap
Renamed Phase 4 from 'Public Launch' to 'Team Scale' with three substages (P4-0, P4-1, P4-2) and removed migration overhead assumptions
Pushed public launch goals to Phase 7 (GitHub release, Twitter thread, external users, brew tap)

in_progress.what: Phase 4 (Team Scale) structure incomplete — P4-2 (askr team CLI) section cut off mid-table at line 567

next_actions.action: Complete Phase 4 (Team Scale) roadmap section: finish P4-2 (askr team CLI) feature table and add P4-3 if needed, then add completion criteria ('Done when: ...')
next_actions.why: Roadmap edit was interrupted; Phase 4 structure is incomplete and needs closure before moving to next phase planning

next_actions.action: Commit the three roadmap.md changes to git with message: 'Restructure phases: approval gate→P5, P4→Team Scale (P4-0/P4-1/P4-2), launch→P7, strip migration overhead'
next_actions.why: Changes are tracked in implementation_state.md but not yet committed; git diff shows modifications that need to be persisted

next_actions.action: Review Phase 5 (Hardening) to confirm approval gate placement doesn't conflict with other hardening features and that it lands before Phase 7 task queuing ships
next_actions.why: User emphasized approval gate must be in place before task queuing (Phase 7) to prevent dangerous permissions from being inherited by queued tasks from other developers

next_actions.action: Update implementation_state.md to reflect that Phase 4 is now 'Team Scale' (not 'Public Launch') and Phase 7 is now 'Public Launch' (not task queuing)
next_actions.why: State tracking file needs to match the restructured roadmap to avoid confusion in future sessions

decisions.decision: Approval gate moved to Phase 5 instead of Phase 7
decisions.reason: Phase 5's theme is 'Zero misfires. Trust is the product.' — approval gate belongs there, and it must ship before task queuing (Phase 7) to prevent dangerous permissions from being inherited by queued tasks

decisions.decision: Phase 4 renamed from 'Public Launch' to 'Team Scale' with substages P4-0, P4-1, P4-2
decisions.reason: Current single-user deployment doesn't need migration complexity; team scaling is the actual next phase after stress testing. Public launch deferred to Phase 7 when team features are stable

decisions.decision: Removed migration overhead from Phase 4 planning
decisions.reason: User clarified askr is only used by them currently, so multi-user migration is not an immediate concern; can be added later if team adoption happens

user_rejected_decisions.what_was_proposed: Phase 7 should contain task queuing with migration overhead for multi-user deployments
user_rejected_decisions.user_signal: there is no migration as of now, it's only me using it, so it won't be as much a ordeal as you imagine. Also, being phase 7 doesn't make sense, but must be phase 4

failed_approaches.approach: Placed task queuing and team features in Phase 7 with migration complexity
failed_approaches.reason: User clarified single-user deployment makes migration premature; restructured to Phase 4 (Team Scale) with simpler substages

relational_files.why: Records architectural decisions about phase structure and feature placement; should be updated to reflect Phase 4→Team Scale rename
Tracks open goals; 'Verify context checkpoint cards display correct turns remaining in staging' is still pending and may be affected by phase restructuring

blockers: Phase 4 (Team Scale) roadmap section is incomplete — P4-2 feature table was cut off mid-edit and needs to be finished before commit
